properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My faithful Father, enduring friend Your tender mercy's like a river with no end It overwhelms me, covers my sin Each time I come into your presence I stand in wonder once again.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your grace still amazes me Your love is still a mystery Each day I fall on my knees 'Cause Your grace still amazes me Your grace still amazes me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh patient savior, You make me whole You are the author and the healer of my soul What can I give You, Lord what can I say I know there's no way to repay You only to offer You my praise.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It's deeper, it's wider, it's stronger, it's higher It's deeper, it's wider, it's stronger, it's higher Than anything my eyes can see.
